==Chinese==
{{zh-forms|alt=噤-Cantonese ''kam<sup>1</sup>'',襟-Cantonese ''kam<sup>1</sup>'',come-Cantonese ''kam<sup>1</sup>''}}

===Glyph origin===
{{Han etym}}
{{Han compound|林|示|ls=psc|c1=p|c2=s|t2=altar}}.

===Etymology===
From {{inh|zh|sit-pro|*krim||custom, prohibition}}. Compare {{cog|bo|ཁྲིམས||law, rule; habit}}, {{cog|lus|hrem||to punish}} and {{cog|sit-jap|khrɯm||punishment}}, although the latter may be borrowed from Tibetan ({{zh-ref|Jacques, 2015}}; {{zh-ref|Jacques, 2004: 89)}}.

{{zh-ref|Schessler (2007)}} also adds {{cog|my|ခြိမ်း||to threaten}} to the list of the possible cognates, however this word likely belongs to {{cog|sit-pro|*m-krim||to threaten}}.

===Pronunciation 1===
{{zh-pron
|m=jīn
|m-x=jǐn
|c=gam1,kam1
|h=pfs=
|j=jing1
|md=gĭng
|mn=
|mn-t=
|w=sh,sz,hz,sx,nb,zs:1cin
|x=jin1
|mc=1
|oc=n,1
|cat=v,c:a,n
}}

====Definitions====
{{head|zh|hanzi}}

# to [[bear]]; to [[endure]]
# to be able to [[withstand]]
#: {{zh-x|我 唔 禁{kam1} 激 㗎。|I '''can'''not '''stand''' getting annoyed.|C}}
# {{lb|zh|usually used in the negative}} to [[contain]] oneself; to [[restrain]] oneself
# to [[torment]]; to [[torture]]
# {{lb|zh|Cantonese}} [[durable]]
#: {{syn|zh|cmn:耐}}
#: {{zh-x|件 衫 啲 料{liu6-2} 好 禁{kam1} 喎{wo3}。|The shirt's material is quite '''durable'''.|C}}
# {{alt form|zh|襟|t=[[coat]] [[sash]]; [[belt]] (to fasten clothes); [[girdle]]}}

====Definitions====
{{head|zh|hanzi}}

# to [[prohibit]]; to [[forbid]]; to [[restrict]]
# to [[pin down]]; to [[restrain]]
# to [[block]]; to [[hinder]]
# to [[imprison]]; to [[detain]]; to take into [[custody]]
# to [[use]] [[incantation]]
# to [[store]] up; to [[hoard]]
# [[ban]]; [[prohibition]]; [[restriction]]; [[interdict]]
# [[taboo]]; [[banned]] [[item]] or [[thing]]
# [[prison]]; [[jail]]; [[confinement]]
# {{lb|zh|historical}} [[court]]; [[palace]]
# {{lb|zh|historical}} [[ritual]] [[table]]; [[wine]] [[altar]]
# [[sorcery]]; [[incantation]]; [[spell]]

==Japanese==

===Kanji===
{{ja-kanji|grade=5|rs=示08}}

# to [[ban]], to [[prohibit]], to [[forbid]]
# to [[confine]]
# [[palace]]

====Readings====
{{ja-readings
|goon=こん
|kanon=きん
|kun=とど-める, いさ-める, たえる
}}

====Compounds====
{{col|ja
|{{ja-r|禁%漁|きん%りょう}}, {{ja-r|禁漁|きんぎょ}}: [[prohibition]] on [[fishing]]
|{{ja-r|禁%猟|きん%りょう}}: [[prohibition]] on [[hunting]]
|{{ja-r|禁%句|きん%く}}: [[taboo]]
|{{ja-r|禁%止|きん%し}}: [[ban]], [[prohibition]]
|{{ja-r|禁%中|きん%ちゅう}}: [[inside]] of a [[palace]]
|{{ja-r|軟禁|なんきん}}: [[house arrest]]
|{{ja-r|禁煙|きんえん}}: [[smoke]] [[ban]]; to [[stop]] [[smoking]]
}}

===Etymology===
{{ja-kanjitab|きん|yomi=o}}
From {{der|ja|ltc|-|sort=きん}} {{ltc-l|禁}}. The ''[[漢音#Japanese|kan'on]]'', so likely a later borrowing.

===Pronunciation===
{{ja-pron|きん|acc=1|acc_ref=DJR}}

===Noun===
{{ja-noun|きん}}

# [[ban]], [[prohibition]]
# [[banned]], [[prohibited]], [[forbidden]]
#: {{ja-usex|転%載 '''禁'''|てん%さい '''きん'''|Reproduction '''prohibited'''.}}
#:* Antonyms : {{ja-r|可|か|[[allowed]]}}
